systems.name: Power Distribution
steps: Swap the drained cell for a fresh one
systems.doneMsg: Power bus rebalanced. The lights feel a little braver already.
systems.lowMsg: Power distribution is easing toward yellow. No rush — but the cells would appreciate a visit.

systems.name: O₂ Recycler
steps: Slot in a clean scrubber cartridge
systems.doneMsg: Scrubber swapped. Take a deep breath — that one's on the house.
systems.lowMsg: The O₂ recycler's scrubber is getting saturated. The air will turn stale before it turns dangerous.

systems.name: Hull Integrity
steps: Bead sealant along the flagged seam
systems.doneMsg: Seam sealed. The old girl holds together for another season.
systems.lowMsg: Micro-abrasion is adding up on the outer hull. A bead of sealant when you have a moment.
